description: Very unusual legal document, maybe some kind of declaration. In rhymed Hebrew and Aramaic. Written on both sides, and without signatures. Involving the late Menashshe b. Yosef and Hillel b. Yiṣḥaq known as Ibn al-ʿAmm. Potentially related to PGPID 2917. Opens with reference to a group of people "complaining and shouting" (קובלים צועקים) and the court's actions upon hearing their cries. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי יוצא דופן, כנראה הצהרה; בעברית וארמית מחורזים; על שני צדדים, ללא חתימות; עוסק במנשה בן יוסף המנוח והלל בן יצחק בן אל-עם
